name: Passbase
description: Passbase — Identity verification SDK with selfie-based document authentication and biometric liveness checking for onboarding flows.

seo.title: Passbase — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Passbase: Passbase — Identity verification SDK with selfie-based document authentication and biometric liveness checking for onboarding flows.

when_to_use: Selfie-based document authentication for fintech onboarding
Biometric liveness check for age verification platforms
Identity verification SDK for gig economy worker onboarding
Document OCR extraction for onboarding form auto-fill
Fraud-resistant KYC for gaming and gambling operators

pros: SDK works across mobile and web surfaces
Liveness check built into the capture flow
Affordable entry point for smaller startups
cons: Original founders and team largely departed
Less innovation recently vs active rivals
review.verdict: Once a popular startup IDV SDK; post-Au10tix acquisition, evaluate roadmap before betting on it.
review.best_for: Small teams already on Passbase or wanting a simple document plus selfie SDK at low volume
review.not_for: Teams starting fresh today where Persona, Onfido or Incode offer clearer long-term roadmaps

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
